# Vendored fixture: Apache Commons Lang `org.apache.commons.lang3.tuple`

The `java/` sources are copied verbatim (Apache License 2.0) from Apache Commons Lang
(https://github.com/apache/commons-lang), `org.apache.commons.lang3.tuple`. Each file
retains its original ASF license header.

They are vendored so the end-to-end case study (docs/CASE_STUDY.md, issue #311) runs
hermetically in `make check` without a corpus checkout. They are inputs to the j2py
translator, not j2py source code.
